# ByteSizedSecurity

> Cybersecurity insights and analysis — investigating cybercrime, security trends, vulnerabilities, and defense strategies.

## Author

Marc David — Senior Security Engineer, ISC2 CISSP
Credentials: https://www.credly.com/users/marcdavid
Site: https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/marccdavid

## About

ByteSizedSecurity is an independent cybersecurity blog covering threat intelligence, privacy, career guidance, and technical deep-dives for security professionals and enthusiasts. Published since 2024 with 37+ articles across 8 topic areas.

## Topic Taxonomy

- Network Security — privacy legislation, encryption policy, credential theft, insider threats
- Vulnerabilities — CVE analysis, data breaches, cloud misconfigurations
- DevSecOps — AI in security, career guidance, automation, future skills
- Web Security — browser extensions, malware delivery, Chrome zero-days
- Blue Team — incident response, identity protection, credit freezes, HIPAA compliance
- Pentesting — tools, ethical hacking, AI-assisted testing
- Cryptography — encryption, secure communications
- Reverse Engineering — malware analysis, binary internals

## Key Pages

- [About](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/about/): Author bio, credentials, and mission
- [Cybersecurity Career Guide](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/cybersecurity-career-guide/): Comprehensive career guide for breaking into cybersecurity — roles, certifications, networking, and job search strategy
- [2FA: The 5-Minute Fix That Stops 99% of Account Attacks](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/16/2fa-the-5-minute-fix-that-stops-99-percent-of-account-attacks/): Practical guide to two-factor authentication — which method to use, which accounts to protect first, and the Microsoft/Google research showing 99.9% attack reduction
- [LexisNexis & Credit Freezes: Your Guide to Identity Protection](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/2026/02/26/lexisnexis-credit-freezes-your-guide-to-identity-protection/): Step-by-step guide to requesting your free LexisNexis Consumer Disclosure Report and freezing your credit at all three bureaus — including how to freeze your children's credit
- [Archive](https://blog.bytesizedsecurity.show/archive/): All posts organized by category
- [Podcast](https://bytesizedsecurity.show/): The ByteSizedSecurity podcast
